reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.tomsguide.com/us/fitness-tracker-buying-guide,review-2549.html and extract every fitness tracker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, rating, price, battery life, heart rate accuracy, GPS, water resistance, display type, pros with specific test data, cons.

Go to https://www.androidauthority.com/best-fitness-tracker-2026-3629589/ and extract every fitness tracker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, battery life, heart rate sensor details, GPS, water resistance, key features, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/best-fitness-tracker-rcna201525 and extract every fitness tracker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, battery life, heart rate, GPS, display, water resistance, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.businessinsider.com/guides/fitness/best-fitness-tracker and extract every fitness tracker and wearable they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, battery life, sensors, GPS, water resistance, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/best-fitness-tracker-b2802103.html and extract every fitness tracker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price, battery life, heart rate accuracy, GPS, water resistance, pros with specifics, cons.
